ringFarmCodes.title: Build A Ring Farm Codes
ringFarmCodes.intro: Redeem active Build A Ring Farm codes for seed packs, sprays, fertilizer, and time skips that accelerate early progression.

ringFarmBeginnerGuide.title: Build A Ring Farm Beginner Guide
ringFarmBeginnerGuide.intro: Build A Ring Farm growth is fastest when you keep plots active, sell on rhythm, and focus upgrades that directly increase harvest speed and value.

steps.title: Plant Every Open Plot
steps.description: Keep each slot productive so your farm never pauses between harvest windows.

steps.title: Push Saw Yield Early
steps.description: Prioritize saw output first so each cycle returns enough cash for meaningful upgrades.

steps.title: Upgrade Sprinkler Power and Range
steps.description: Stronger sprinklers keep outer plots growing at the same pace as central plots.

steps.title: Roll Better Seeds and Replace Starters
steps.description: Swap low-value crops quickly once stronger rarity seeds appear.

steps.title: Use Boost Items on High-Value Crops
steps.description: Save fertilizer and premium sprays for crops with strong base value.

ringFarmSeedsTierList.title: Build A Ring Farm Seeds Tier List
ringFarmSeedsTierList.intro: Use this Build A Ring Farm seed ladder to decide when to replace weak crops and where to spend your upgrade budget.

tiers.name: S Tier Seeds
tiers.description: Top-end rarity pulls are your best long-term slots and should receive premium boosts first.

tiers.name: A Tier Seeds
tiers.description: Strong mid-game crops that carry income while you chase elite and exotic pulls.

tiers.name: B Tier Seeds
tiers.description: Reliable transition crops that outperform starters and fund early expansion.

tiers.name: Starter Seeds
tiers.description: Useful for opening minutes, but replace quickly instead of over-leveling them.

ringFarmMutationsGuide.title: Build A Ring Farm Mutations Guide
ringFarmMutationsGuide.intro: Mutations in Build A Ring Farm multiply crop value and are one of the largest profit levers once your farm is stable.

entries.name: Value Multipliers
entries.description: Target high-multiplier mutations on your highest-value crops, not starter plants.

entries.name: Spray Timing
entries.description: Apply sprays after crop quality and upgrade levels are already competitive.

entries.name: Mutation Routing
entries.description: Build farming cycles around repeatable mutation sources and event windows.

entries.name: Recovery Strategy
entries.description: Use utility sprays when a bad mutation blocks income-focused setups.

ringFarmMoneyFarming.title: Build A Ring Farm Money Farming
ringFarmMoneyFarming.intro: Build A Ring Farm money farming is built around one loop: plant crops, let the sawmill harvest, sell the crop income, then reinvest into stronger seeds, better machine coverage, and larger rings.

items.title: Sell crops on a steady rhythm
items.keyData: Cash only helps after you collect and sell your harvest.
items.action: Check your farm often, sell the stored crop income, then immediately spend that money on Saw Yield, Sprinkler Power, Seed Luck, or a better crop roll.

items.title: Replace low-tier crops early
items.keyData: Carrots start at about $3 per unit, while stronger crops such as cabbage can reach about $85 per unit before later tiers scale higher.
items.action: Do not sink too much cash into common crops. After a common crop reaches around level 10, start saving for higher-rarity seeds instead.

items.title: Use rare seed rolls for income jumps
items.keyData: Seed rarity moves upward through Common, Uncommon, Rare, Epic, Legendary, Secret, Prismatic, Divine, Exotic, and top-tier seeds.
items.action: Upgrade Seed Luck over time and use seed packs or lever rolls to replace weaker plots with higher-rarity crops.
items.bestFor: Players stuck on slow cash gain

items.title: Put fertilizer on your best crops
items.keyData: Strong Fertilizer is more valuable on high-income crops than on every small starter crop.
items.action: Save Strong Fertilizer for your highest-value plants, especially after you have already upgraded the crop or found a rare seed worth keeping.
items.bestFor: Mid game and event reward usage

items.title: Farm mutations while online
items.keyData: Mutations multiply crop income, with Rainbow listed as the top mutation at 5x.
items.action: Stay active during weather events and use mutation sprays on valuable crops. Offline earnings help with passive cash, but mutation chances need active play.

items.title: Expand only when you can fill the ring
items.keyData: New rings add more plots, but empty outer plots do not earn money.
items.action: Fill and upgrade your current ring first, then buy the next ring and upgrade Saw Range and Sprinkler Range so the machines reach the new plots.

ringFarmUpgradesGuide.title: Build A Ring Farm Upgrades Guide
ringFarmUpgradesGuide.intro: The best Build A Ring Farm upgrade path is not to level everything evenly. Early cash should go into harvest amount and growth speed, while range upgrades become important once your farm expands into more rings.

items.title: Saw Yield
items.effect: Increases how much crop income the sawmill collects per pass.
items.recommendedAction: Push Saw Yield to level 7 or 8 early before spreading money across too many other upgrades.
items.whenToUpgrade: Immediately after your first steady crop setup

items.title: Sprinkler Power
items.effect: Improves crop growth speed and helps your watered plots produce faster.
items.recommendedAction: Upgrade Sprinkler Power alongside Saw Yield so your farm grows quickly enough for the sawmill to keep producing cash.
items.whenToUpgrade: Early game and every time growth starts feeling slow

items.title: Saw Range
items.effect: Helps the sawmill cover plots farther away from the center.
items.recommendedAction: Buy Saw Range after unlocking a second or third ring so outer plots are harvested instead of sitting unused.

items.title: Sprinkler Range
items.effect: Lets the sprinkler reach more plots as your ring farm grows outward.
items.recommendedAction: Upgrade Sprinkler Range whenever new outer plots are not being watered consistently.
items.whenToUpgrade: After adding new rings or wider plot space

items.title: Seed Luck
items.effect: Improves the chance of pulling rarer seeds from the lever.
items.recommendedAction: Add Seed Luck upgrades every few sessions while still keeping Saw Yield strong.
items.whenToUpgrade: Once basic harvesting and watering are stable

items.title: Ring Expansion
items.effect: Adds more plot space, but costs rise sharply with each ring.
items.recommendedAction: Do not unlock empty land too early. Fill your current ring with useful crops first, then expand and upgrade range coverage.
items.whenToUpgrade: When your current ring is full and profitable

ringFarmGearAndSprays.title: Build A Ring Farm Gear and Sprays
ringFarmGearAndSprays.intro: Build A Ring Farm gear rewards are strongest when they are saved for the plots that already make good money.

items.effect: Gives a seed pack reward for expanding your crop options.
items.bestUse: Open when you are ready to replace low-tier crops with stronger seeds.

items.effect: Used as a crop boost item.
items.bestUse: Spend it on your highest-value crop instead of spreading it across weak starter plants.
Use after planting your best available crops so the skipped time produces better value.
Save for a valuable crop slot instead of using it on a crop you plan to replace.

items.howToGet: Code reward from BARF:3 or Gear Shop for $1M
items.effect: Removes the current mutation from a plant.
items.bestUse: Use when a strong crop has the wrong mutation and you want to reset it for a better setup.

items.effect: Applies the Wet mutation path, which gives a 1.5x income multiplier.
items.bestUse: Good first mutation target for early valuable crops.

items.effect: Applies the Frozen mutation path, which gives a 1.75x income multiplier.
items.bestUse: Use after your farm can comfortably afford mid-game spray costs.

items.effect: Applies the Void mutation path, which gives a 2.25x income multiplier.
items.bestUse: Use on crops you expect to keep through several upgrade cycles.

items.effect: Applies the Radioactive mutation path, which gives a 3x income multiplier.
items.bestUse: Use on high-rarity crops with strong base value.

items.effect: Applies the Rainbow mutation path, which gives a 5x income multiplier.
items.bestUse: Save for your best crop because it is the strongest listed mutation boost.

ringFarmUpdateLog.title: Build A Ring Farm Update Log
ringFarmUpdateLog.intro: This Build A Ring Farm update log focuses on changes players care about most: new redeem codes, free rewards, mutation tools, and official notes that affect farming progress.

entries.title: UPD 2 code rewards added
entries.summary: Three newer rewards were added for the UPD 2 wave.

entries.title: Active code list checked
entries.summary: The currently listed active rewards include seed packs, sprays, fertilizer, and a time skip.

entries.title: Mutation multipliers tracked
entries.summary: The listed mutation set includes Wet, Frozen, Void, Radioactive, and Rainbow.

entries.title: Official gameplay notes
entries.summary: The official Roblox page describes the core loop as growing and harvesting plants, upgrading and expanding the farm, selling plants for cash, and earning while offline.
changes: Offline earnings are part of the official description
The game is listed as new
Players are encouraged to like the game and join the group for rewards

faq.title: Build A Ring Farm
faq.subtitle: Common player questions about Build A Ring Farm progression and rewards.

questions.question: How often are Build A Ring Farm codes updated?
questions.answer: Build A Ring Farm codes usually update around milestones, patches, and engagement goals. Check the codes module regularly for the latest list.

questions.question: What should I upgrade first in Build A Ring Farm?
questions.answer: In Build A Ring Farm, prioritize Saw Yield and Sprinkler Power first, then expand range and seed quality as your income stabilizes.

questions.question: Are mutations important in Build A Ring Farm?
questions.answer: Yes, Build A Ring Farm mutations are a major part of high-income farming and should be applied to top-value crops.

questions.question: Can Build A Ring Farm earn progress while offline?
questions.answer: Build A Ring Farm supports offline earnings, so preparing your best crop layout before logout improves passive gains.
